entries.definition:
t-l-l hill, heap, mound, elevation, to mount, to heap up; to
knock down, to lay down, to be tough, to be stocky, to agitate. Of
this root, تَلَّه talla occurs once in the Qurʾān.

تَلَّه talla i [v. trans.] to throw or lay someone face down, with
his mouth or forehead touching the ground, or on his side with the
side of his forehead touching the ground (37:103) فَلَمَّا أَسْلَمَا وَتَلَّهُ لِلْجَبِينِ
when they had both submitted [to God], and he had laid him
down on his forehead.
